questions.question: Who starred in the 1984 comedy Police Academy, where a group of eccentrics are trying to join the local fight against crime?
Popularized by M.C. Hammer and sometimes called Hammer Pants, what was another name for this 80's hip-hop trend?
What band's self-titled album in 1976 became the fastest-selling debut ever with the hit "More Than a Feeling"?
In 1988, Libyan terrorists planted a bomb in Pan Am Flight 103. What city in Scotland did the explosion occur, killing everyone on board and people on the ground?
Finish the jingle: "Have a Coke and _____________."
